violations.text: Packaged grab and go hot foods were lacking all required information on food labels during time of inspection. PIC informed. Labels in process of being printed and placed on foods during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The floors in restroom were observed with black residue and water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

1. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by papers and plastic hotel pans. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. 2. The hand-washing sink in the warewashing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The lid to the refuse unit on the right side was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
One air circulating fan unit in walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the counter under beverage dispensing machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Water was observed leaking from gooseneck faucet and at discharge pipe at 3 bay sink. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The floors under shelving and equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
